team_members.name: Sasha Plotvinov
team_members.role: Founder / CEO, Open Builders (Notcoin developer studio)
prior_projects: Various Telegram mini-app experiments on TON blockchain
team_members.notes: Publicly identified founder; active on X/Twitter (@plotvinov). Open Builders is the TON-ecosystem studio that built the Notcoin tap-to-earn game. LinkedIn profile exists but detail is sparse as of mid-2024.

team_members.name: Anatoliy Makosov
team_members.notes: Named in multiple press interviews (e.g., Decrypt, CoinDesk) as co-founder. LinkedIn URL not confirmed via free search; profile may exist under variant spelling. Active on Telegram.

team_members.name: Slava Yakimenko
team_members.notes: Referenced in Open Builders team pages and press. LinkedIn not independently confirmed via free-tier search.

investors.notes: TON Foundation provided ecosystem grants and launchpad support. Specific equity/token allocation terms not publicly disclosed. Source: ton.org ecosystem page and Notcoin blog.
Pantera is a known TON ecosystem investor and participated in NOT-related rounds per public statements, but specific NOT token allocation not disclosed. NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER for exact terms.

Binance Labs listed as backer in Notcoin's public communications and Binance Research report (May 2024). Token allocation and vesting schedule NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER — not disclosed in free public filings.
Listed as strategic partner/investor in Notcoin ecosystem materials. Specific terms not public.
~80% of total 102.7 billion NOT supply was distributed to ~35 million Telegram game players via voucher airdrop at TGE (May 2024). Fully liquid at launch per tokenomics doc.

legal_events.description: No SEC EDGAR filings found for 'Notcoin', 'Open Builders', or related entities as of research date. No Form D, S-1, or enforcement action located via free EDGAR full-text search (efts.sec.gov).

No known regulatory enforcement actions, sanctions, or litigation identified in free public sources (SEC EDGAR, OFAC SDN list, public court records). Project operates under TON Foundation's legal umbrella, which is incorporated in the British Virgin Islands.
NOT token listed on Binance (spot) following TGE. No legal challenge to listing identified. Binance conducted its own compliance review as part of listing process — outcome: approved listing.

founder_credibility_summary: Sasha Plotvinov and the Open Builders team are publicly doxxed, TON-native builders with a verifiable track record of shipping the Notcoin game to 35M+ Telegram users — one of the largest crypto user-acquisition events in history. No fraud allegations, rug-pull history, or regulatory actions have been identified in free public sources, though the team's prior project history outside the TON ecosystem is limited.
vc_overhang_summary: Specific VC vesting schedules for Binance Labs, Pantera, and TON Ventures are NOT publicly disclosed, creating meaningful uncertainty about potential sell pressure. The tokenomics allocate roughly 20% of supply to team/investors/ecosystem (per Notcoin's published tokenomics), while ~80% went to public airdrop recipients who are already fully liquid — meaning retail holders absorbed most early dilution at TGE.
alignment_summary: Incentives are partially aligned: the large public airdrop (80% of supply to actual game players) is unusually retail-friendly and reduces typical VC-vs-retail tension. However, undisclosed VC vesting cliffs and team allocation unlock schedules introduce asymmetric information risk. If insider tokens vest on a schedule not visible to retail, coordinated selling could occur without warning. Until full vesting schedules are published on-chain or in audited docs, alignment is PARTIAL rather than strong.
